question_text: Many patients visit clinics with symptoms like fever, cough, headache, and fatigue. Doctors often rely on experience to diagnose the disease, but inexperienced practitioners or situations with limited resources may lead to misdiagnosis. There is a need for an expert system that can assist healthcare providers in diagnosing common diseases by analyzing patient symptoms and providing possible diagnoses along with recommendations for further tests or treatments. For the given set of data build an expert system rule base.
subject: AI
